action.text: # Convention: define private properties with __, define protected properites with _

from types import SimpleNamespace
self.shared_var = SimpleNamespace(value=False) # Define a variable with a default value false that can be shard within multiple classes
self.subClassInstance= SubClass(…shared_var=self.shared_var) # Transfer it to the target class
class SubClass():
	def __init__(shared_var):
		self.shared_var = shared_var # Use it in the target class
	self.shared_var.value = True # Assign value of it, all instances of this variable will get updated synchronously
